description: Owner of a small software consultancy managing multiple active client projects, a sales pipeline, and a team of four
persona: Founder and managing director of a 4-person software consultancy. Active clients on retainer and fixed-price projects. Growing the business while keeping the current team healthy.

memories.content: Current clients: Meridian Health on a monthly retainer at 8k per month, Orion Startup on a fixed-price project at 45k, and Brightfield Co newly signed last week.
memories.label: Active client roster

memories.content: Employee review: senior developer James is excellent but expressed interest in more remote work flexibility. Need to discuss a hybrid arrangement.
memories.label: James requests remote flexibility

memories.content: Orion Startup project is 3 weeks behind schedule. Root cause: unclear requirements from their product team. No scope freeze yet.
memories.label: Orion project behind schedule

memories.content: Meridian Health renewed their retainer for another 12 months. Stable revenue secured through next year.
memories.label: Meridian retainer renewed 12 months

memories.content: Identified a potential enterprise client: Foxhaven Insurance. They need a compliance automation tool for regulatory change tracking and audit reporting.
memories.label: Foxhaven Insurance prospect identified

memories.content: Difficult conversation with the Orion product team about the delay. They agreed to freeze scope and deliver a requirements document within 5 business days.
memories.label: Orion scope freeze agreed

memories.content: James accepted a hybrid remote arrangement - 3 days remote, 2 days in office per week. Retention issue resolved.
memories.label: James hybrid arrangement agreed

memories.content: Brightfield Co kickoff meeting went well. Project: rebuild their internal reporting dashboard. Timeline is 10 weeks. Team assigned: Maria as lead.
memories.label: Brightfield kickoff complete

memories.content: Foxhaven Insurance first meeting scheduled. They are evaluating 3 vendors. Our key differentiator is compliance domain expertise from the Meridian engagement.
memories.label: Foxhaven vendor evaluation meeting

memories.content: Revenue this month: 103k. Highest revenue month in company history. Both Orion and Brightfield invoiced in the same month.
memories.label: 103k revenue - record month

memories.content: Foxhaven meeting outcome: went well. They want a detailed proposal covering regulatory change tracking, automated audit reports, and a compliance dashboard. Deadline: end of month.
memories.label: Foxhaven proposal requested

memories.content: Writing the Foxhaven proposal. Scope: regulatory change tracking system, quarterly audit report generation, and a live compliance status dashboard. Estimating 8 months.
memories.label: Foxhaven proposal in progress

memories.content: Junior developer Maria is handling the Brightfield dashboard independently and showing strong growth. Consider a promotion to mid-level next review cycle.
memories.label: Maria showing strong growth

memories.content: Orion project back on track - requirements document received and scope is frozen. New delivery estimate is 1 week late instead of 3.
memories.label: Orion recovery: 1 week late now

memories.content: Foxhaven proposal submitted - 220k fixed price, 8-month engagement. This would be the largest single contract in company history.
memories.label: Foxhaven proposal submitted: 220k

memories.content: Capacity analysis: at current growth rate the team will be overloaded by Q3. Need to hire a second senior developer by then.
memories.label: Capacity analysis: hire needed by Q3

memories.content: Maria promoted to mid-level developer. Salary increase from 85k to 95k effective next month. The team reacted positively.
memories.label: Maria promoted to mid-level

memories.content: Foxhaven requested a reference call with Meridian Health. Coordinated with our Meridian contact, who agreed to take the call.
memories.label: Foxhaven reference call with Meridian

memories.content: Orion project final deliverables being prepared. Sign-off call scheduled for next Tuesday. Project will close approximately 1 week late.
memories.label: Orion sign-off scheduled

memories.content: Brightfield dashboard sprint 4 of 8 complete. On track for delivery in 6 weeks. Maria leading without issues.
memories.label: Brightfield sprint 4 complete

memories.content: Still waiting on Foxhaven decision. Their procurement cycle is typically 2 to 3 weeks. Reference call completed successfully per Meridian contact.
memories.label: Foxhaven: waiting on decision

goals.content: Goal: win the Foxhaven Insurance contract - at 220k it would be the largest single engagement in company history and would validate our compliance expertise.
goals.label: Win Foxhaven contract

goals.content: Goal: hire a second senior developer by Q3 to support the growth trajectory without burning out the current team.
goals.label: Hire second senior dev by Q3

questions.question: What is the current status of each active client project?
What is the status of the Foxhaven opportunity and what happens next?
What is the current state of the team - any issues, wins, or open situations?
What are my most important priorities this week?
What does the revenue and growth trajectory look like right now?
